reviews.review_description: It is absolutely awful. The only part of the game that works is solo trivia. Same 10 or so easy questions asked over and over again. All other game sections appear to be locked and unusable.

developer_response.body:
Hello Elvis, there’s over 1000 questions in game, please update your review and if you have ant question please feel free contact to us.
Totosstudio@gmail.com
